name: Help Scout
description: Monitor Help Scout customer support platform for mailbox access and team member compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Help Scout at https://secure.helpscout.net
2. Go to Your Profile > My Apps
3. Click 'Create My App'
4. Enter any name and a redirect URL (e.g. https://example.com)
5. Copy the App ID and App Secret
6. Enter them below

credentialFields.label: Application ID
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Help Scout Your Profile > My Apps

credentialFields.label: Application Secret
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Help Scout Your Profile > My Apps

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Help Scout team members with access to customer support mailboxes

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Help Scout mailboxes are active for customer support
